# Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change works as intended.
- [ ] Appropriate tests were added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation was added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] Errors and edge cases were considered.
- [ ] Project conventions were followed.
- [ ] README or docs were updated if needed.
- [ ] Changelog was updated if needed.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or visual notes.
- [ ] Security and privacy implications were considered.

## Strata Checks

- [ ] Telemetry data capture is documented, if applicable.
- [ ] Sensitive data is redacted by default, if applicable.
- [ ] Dashboard access and sharing implications were reviewed, if applicable.

## Testing

List the commands, checks, or manual verification performed.
